prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-BDC234BLT-2PC-SET Product Type: JEWELRY_STORAGE Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Black Wood Glass Top Display Case Storage Box and Black Flocked Liner Tray for Jewelry Organization, 2pc Set Description: This glass top black wooden display case is perfect for your organizing bracelets, necklaces, rings and other jewelry pieces.

Keep them safe, organized, protected and easily accessible in you bathroom, bedroom, dressing room, closet or walk-in closet.

BOX DIMENSIONS:

Outer Dimensions: 14-1/2" x 8-1/8" x 3"
Inner Dimensions: 14" x 7-3/4"

TRAY DIMENSIONS:

Tray Size: 13- 3/4" x 7- 5/8"
Section Size: 1- 1/8" x 6 -3/4" x 1/2"
Tray Design: Flocked

SPECIFICATIONS:

Box Material: Finished Wood
Tray Material: Plastic
Color: Black
Hinges/Close Clasps: Metal

PACKAGE INCLUDES:

(1) Black Display case
(1) Black Plastic Flocking Liner Search Terms: jewelry box trinkets display holder ring holder necklace box Features: - Black, wood case - Glass lid - 2-3/4" x 3-1/2" x 1" Black Liner Tray === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
